title: smartScreen blocked my app
excerpt: Hi there. I’m developing an app on my Monday account. Through a tunnel in ngrok for testing. but today I get a red screen with the message “Microsoft Defender SmartScreen blocked this unsafe content.” How to fix this pro…

posts.author: isrraelRios (Isrrael Rios)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there. I’m developing an app on my Monday account. Through a tunnel in ngrok for testing. but today I get a red screen with the message “Microsoft Defender SmartScreen blocked this unsafe content.” How to fix this problem? Was it something I did? Is it a problem with ngrok?
I hope your help. thank you.

image1594×773 39.4 KB

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Click on the “more information” dropdown, usually the option to manually whitelist is there.

There isn’t likely a security issue with ngrok or your app, its just that microsoft considers the totality of the situation and says this could be something risk.

Id also recommend post to the developer community section: monday Apps & Developers - monday Community Forum as this one is intended for users of apps and integrations.
